title: Essence
description: A light Quilt modpack that combines several simple mods together to enhance the vanilla game's experience, all on the client side
body: ### Essence is a light Quillt modpack that combines several simple mods together to enhance the vanilla game's experience. ## Mod list: - 3dSkinLayers - AppleSkin - Architectury - Balm - Cloth Config - Custom Splash Screen - Default Options - Distant Horizons - Effective - Essence Resources - Fabric Capes - Fabric Language Kotlin - Infinite Music - Inventory Essentials - Jade - LambDynamicLights - Lithium - Logical Zoom - Mod Menu - Quilted Fabric API - Roughly Enough Items - Sodium - Starlight - Window Title Changer - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map
